baseline.sql:
WITH movie_genres AS (
      SELECT t.title, AI.GENERATE(
        prompt => ('Extract all applicable genres for each movie based on their description: ', t.text),
        connection_id => 'us.connection',
        endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash',
        output_schema => 'genres ARRAY<STRING>'
      ).genres AS genres
      FROM mmqa.lizzy_caplan_text_data t
      WHERE t.title IN UNNEST(@titles)
    )
    SELECT title, genres FROM movie_genres

cost_breakdown._note: cost from paper per-call rate (no AI.GENERATE calibration)

cascade.method: agglomerative single-link sim≥0.76; AI.GENERATE on medoids; propagate genre array

WITH movie_genres AS (
      SELECT t.title, AI.GENERATE(
        prompt => ('Extract all applicable genres for each movie based on their description: ', t.text),
        connection_id => 'us.connection',
        endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash',
        output_schema => 'genres ARRAY<STRING>'
      ).genres AS genres
      FROM mmqa.lizzy_caplan_text_data t
      WHERE t.title IN UNNEST(@titles)
    )
    SELECT title, genres FROM movie_genres
